descriptions: South Brooklyn Devils was a constituent gang that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys.

Tokyo Boyz.description: Japanese American gang founded in 1942 at Manzanar concentration camp during World War II. Initially formed by rebellious youths due to harsh internment conditions, the gang engaged in petty crimes like stealing rations. After release, members continued criminal activities in California, with membership growing post-internment. The gang was active until 1996.

descriptions: Issei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).

descriptions: Jackson-Side Wah Ching is listed as an ally of Tokyo Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jackson-Side Wah Ching

descriptions: Kibei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).

descriptions: Nisei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).

descriptions: Jesters MC is a support club for Gypsy Joker MC Norway.
edges.evidence_quote: Gypsy Joker MC Norway have a support club in Brazil, Jesters MC, established in 2017.

descriptions: The Cutters had a strong rivalry with Millwall Bushwackers.
edges.evidence_quote: claims that the Cutters had strong rivalries with hooligan firms of the two Manchester teams, Manchester United F.C. and Manchester City F.C., the Sunderland firm Seaburn Casuals, as well as with the Chelsea Headhunters, a firm associated with Chelsea F.C., and the Millwall Bushwackers, a firm associated with Millwall F.C.

George Street.description: George Street is a Bloods-affiliated street gang based in Belize City, Belize, allegedly formed in the late 1980s by US deportee Heathcliff Reyes. It is one of the country's earliest gangs and has been involved in violent conflicts with rival gangs. The gang's territory was estimated as among the largest in Belize in 2018, with membership ranging from 40 to 150. As of 2021, it remains one of the largest gangs in Belize.

descriptions: George Street is affiliated with Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: George Street are a Bloods-affiliated street gang

descriptions: George Street carried out hits against Brick City leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: successful hits against leaders of rival gangs ( Southside , Brick City, Ghost Town ) in 2010

descriptions: George Street carried out hits against Ghost Town leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: successful hits against leaders of rival gangs ( Southside , Brick City, Ghost Town ) in 2010

descriptions: George Street was formed to oppose Majestic Alley, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: George Street are a Bloods-affiliated street gang in Southside Belize City, allegedly formed in the late 1980s by US deportee Heathcliff Reyes to oppose the concurrently formed Majestic Alley (Crips).

descriptions: George Street lists Pregnant Alley as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: List Majestic Alley , Taylor's Alley , Southside , Pregnant Alley , Brick City , Ghost Town

descriptions: George Street had a bitter rivalry with Taylor's Alley.
edges.evidence_quote: a bitter rivalry with the neighbouring Taylor's Alley (Bloods) which bled into the 2010s

Inzerillo Mafia clan.description: The Inzerillo Mafia clan is a Sicilian Mafia clan from Palermo, founded in the 1960s by Salvatore Inzerillo. It was historically among the most powerful in Sicily and allied with the Gambino crime family in the United States. The clan was nearly wiped out in the early 1980s Mafia war but later returned to Sicily. It remains active in drug trafficking and money laundering.

descriptions: The Inzerillo family was a primary rival of the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: The Corleonesi's primary rivals were Stefano Bontade , Salvatore Inzerillo and Tano Badalamenti , bosses of various powerful Palermo Mafia families.

descriptions: The Gambino family lists Inzerillo clan as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cosa Nostra Inzerillo Mafia clan, Corleonesi, ...

descriptions: Frank Cali, a Gambino member, acted as ambassador for the Inzerillo family in the US.
edges.evidence_quote: He was allegedly the 'ambassador' in the US for the Inzerillo crime family.

descriptions: Carlo Gambino formed an alliance with the Inzerillo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carlo Gambino created an alliance between the Gambino family and three Sicilian clans: the Inzerillos, the Spatolas and the Di Maggios.

descriptions: The Gambino family and Inzerillo clan formed a transatlantic alliance, cooperating in heroin trafficking and mutual protection.
edges.evidence_quote: Together the Inzerillo-Gambino Mafia clan formed a transatlantic Mafia family, based in Palermo and New York.

descriptions: The American Cosa Nostra exerted pressure on the Sicilian Mafia Commission regarding the Inzerillo family.
edges.evidence_quote: the Sicilian Mafia Commission, under pressure from the American Cosa Nostra, decided to grant a pardon to the rest of the Inzerillo family

descriptions: The Inzerillo clan lists the Catania Mafia family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Catania Mafia family

descriptions: The Inzerillo clan lists the Corleonesi as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Corleonesi

descriptions: The Corleonesi attacked and nearly exterminated the Inzerillo clan during the Second Mafia War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Inzerillo clan had been on the verge of total extermination by Totò Riina and the Corleonesi during the Second Mafia War in Sicily when in 1981 the family boss Salvatore Inzerillo was killed.

descriptions: The Inzerillo clan was associated with the Gambino crime family through Carlo Gambino and later John Gambino.
edges.evidence_quote: The Inzerillo family was associated with the former American Mafia boss Carlo Gambino and his family.

descriptions: The Inzerillo clan lists the Greco Mafia clan as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Greco Mafia clan

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Santa Maria di Gesù Mafia family

Tribesmen Motorcycle Club.description: The Tribesmen are a prominent outlaw motorcycle club based in the North Island of New Zealand, founded in 1980 in Murupara. They are known for their yellow colors and middle finger salute, and have chapters in Ōtara, Northland, Rotorua, Murupara, and Christchurch. The club was one of the first organized groups to import and manufacture methamphetamine in New Zealand, but lost influence due to overindulgence in their own product. As of 2020, they are considered the dominant gang in Christchurch.

descriptions: Tribesmen became a prospective Hells Angels chapter in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tribesmen became a prospective Hells Angels chapter

descriptions: A Tribesmen member shot Killer Beez leader Josh Masters, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 April 2019 Killer Beez head Josh Masters, a prominent gang member was shot by a member of the Tribesmen at a Harley Davidson dealership in Mount Wellington, Auckland.

descriptions: Conflicts between the two gangs led to multiple shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2022, conflicts between the Tribesmen and Killer Beez led to shootings in South Auckland.

descriptions: Killer Beez was founded as a spin-off of the Tribesmen gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They were founded in 2003, as a large rogue street gang in Ōtara, as a spin-off of the larger 'Tribesmen' gang.

descriptions: Tribesmen MC is listed as a rival of Mongrel Mob in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Power, Road Knights, Tribesmen, and Killer Beez

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bad Troublesome Ward, New Zealand Nomads , Black Power

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bad Troublesome Ward, New Zealand Nomads , Black Power

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mongrel Mob , Hells Angels

descriptions: Relationship deteriorated into conflict with shootings in 2019 and 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: The relationship between Tribesmen and Killer Beez deteriorated in 2019 with the shooting of Killer Beez president Josh Masters, and resulted in multiple outbreaks of gunfire in Auckland and Kaitaia in 2022.

descriptions: Killer Beez was founded as a feeder gang for the Tribesmen.
edges.evidence_quote: The Killer Beez were founded in 2003 by then-Vice President of the Tribesmen New Zealand, Josh Masters, as a feeder gang for the Tribesmen.

descriptions: Tribesmen members fought with Mongrel Mob members in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2020, 10 members of the Tribesmen Christchurch confronted a small group of Mongrel Mob members outside of the Christchurch District Court.

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mongrel Mob , Hells Angels

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bad Troublesome Ward, New Zealand Nomads , Black Power

descriptions: Rebels attempted to recruit Tribesmen members through patching over.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2011, the newly established Rebels Motorcycle Club New Zealand Chapter voiced its intentions to 'patch over' the Tribesmen Motorcycle Club.

'Ndrina Nicoscia.description: The 'Ndrina Nicoscia is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Isola Capo Rizzuto, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Grande Aracri and Russelli clans and operates in several Italian regions, including Emilia-Romagna and Lombardy. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other criminal activities, and has been targeted by multiple police operations such as Scacco Matto and Isola.

descriptions: Arena and Nicoscia were in conflict in the Isola feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Isola: scoppiata nel 2000 tra gli Arena e i Nicoscia.

descriptions: Arena and Nicoscia were in a feud in 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida riprende nel 2004 con l'omicidio di Franco Arena scoppia una faida fra gli Arena -Dragone e i Nicoscia - Grande Aracri.

descriptions: Arena and Nicoscia are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: tra questi i Paparo, alleati dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: The Paparo are allied with the Barbaro, Bubbo, Nicoscia, and Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: i Paparo alleati dei Barbaro, dei Bubbo, dei Nicoscia e degli Arena

descriptions: Bubbo is allied with Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Nicoscia

descriptions: Grande Aracri and Nicoscia are allied against Arena-Dragone.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida riprende nel 2004 con l'omicidio di Franco Arena scoppia una faida fra gli Arena -Dragone e i Nicoscia - Grande Aracri.

descriptions: Grande Aracri and Nicoscia were allied in a feud against Arena, Trapasso, Dragone, and Megna.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Grande Aracri- Nicoscia -Capicchiano e Russelli e gli Arena - Trapasso - Dragone e Megna

descriptions: Nicoscia is listed as an allied 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Nicoscia (Isola Capo Rizzuto)

descriptions: Megna was allied with Nicoscia during a war.
edges.evidence_quote: era in corso una guerra tra i Megna alleati con gli Arena e i Nicoscia

descriptions: There is a faida (feud) between the Nicoscia and the Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Nonostante a Isola Capo Rizzuto sia in corso una faida tra Nicoscia e gli Arena , dall'operazione Isola del 2009 sembra che in nome degli affari la faida in Lombardia , dove vi sono diramazioni delle cosche madri non sia arrivata e che i Paparo insieme a queste abbiano svolto le loro attività illecite .

descriptions: Bubbo is listed as an allied 'ndrina of the Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Bubbo

descriptions: The Nicoscia are allied with the Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Nicoscia è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese che opera a Isola Capo Rizzuto , alleata con i Grande Aracri e i Russelli .

descriptions: The Paparo are allies of the Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 16 marzo 2009, i carabinieri di Sesto San Giovanni ( MI ), nell'operazione Isola , iniziata nel 2004, hanno ordinato l'arresto, per vari reati, di più di 20 persone a Milano , Crotone , Catanzaro e Taranto tra cui associazione a delinquere di stampo mafioso, detenzione e porto illegale di armi, estorsione e tentato omicidio, tra questi i Paparo , alleati dei Nicoscia e degli Arena, accusati di sfruttamento dell'immigrazione, riciclaggio, violenza privata, favoreggiamento di latitanti e atti d'intimidazione nella costruzione delle grandi opere pubbliche della Lombardia , come alcune tratte dell'alta velocità ferroviaria Milano - Venezia .

descriptions: The Nicoscia are in relation with the Capicchiano family.
edges.evidence_quote: Con l'operazione Scacco Matto nel 2000 era stata scardinata l'intera 'ndrina dei Nicoscia grazie all'arresto di figure di spicco tra cui il reggente Salvatore Nicoscia, creando un vuoto colmato in parte da esponenti della famiglia dei Capicchiano con cui sono in relazione come: Rosario Capicchiano, Salvatore Capicchiano e Gaetano De Meco .

descriptions: The Nicoscia are allied with the Russelli.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Nicoscia è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese che opera a Isola Capo Rizzuto , alleata con i Grande Aracri e i Russelli .

descriptions: Paparo is allied with Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Nicoscia
